recipes.title: Mediterranean Falafel Bowl
recipes.description: Crispy baked falafel served over fluffy couscous with fresh vegetables and tahini dressing.
instructions: **Preheat** the oven to 200°C (400°F) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Drain and pat dry the chickpeas. Blend with parsley, garlic, cumin, and salt until a *coarse mixture* forms.
Shape into **small patties** and place on the baking sheet. Bake for 25 minutes, flipping halfway.
Cook couscous according to package directions and fluff with a fork.
Whisk tahini with lemon juice and water until smooth. Assemble bowls with couscous, falafel, tomatoes, and *diced cucumber*.
Drizzle generously with **tahini dressing** and serve.

recipes.title: Vegan Black Bean Tacos
recipes.description: Smoky spiced black beans in warm corn tortillas with avocado, salsa, and pickled onions.
instructions: Drain and rinse the black beans. Mash half roughly with a fork, leaving the rest whole.
Heat the beans in a skillet with cumin, smoked paprika, and **chili powder** over medium heat for 5 minutes.
Thinly slice the red onion and toss with lime juice to *quick-pickle* for 10 minutes.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet for **30 seconds** per side.
Fill each tortilla with black beans, sliced avocado, pickled onion, and *fresh cilantro*.

recipes.title: Indian Chana Masala
recipes.description: A rich and aromatic North Indian chickpea curry simmered in a spiced tomato sauce.
instructions: Sauté diced onion in oil over **medium heat** until golden, about 8 minutes.
Add minced ginger, garlic, and garam masala. Cook for *1 minute* until fragrant.
Pour in crushed tomatoes and simmer for **10 minutes** until thickened.
Add drained chickpeas, stir well, and cook for another 15 minutes on *low heat*.
Serve over steamed basmati rice with a squeeze of **fresh lemon**.

recipes.title: Japanese Edamame Rice Bowl
recipes.description: A light and nutritious Japanese-inspired bowl with seasoned rice, edamame, and sesame dressing.
instructions: Cook sushi rice according to package directions and season with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt.
Boil edamame in salted water for **3–4 minutes**, then drain.
Whisk together soy sauce, sesame oil, and a splash of *rice vinegar* for the dressing.
Divide rice between bowls and top with edamame, shredded nori, and pickled ginger.
Drizzle with **sesame dressing** and sprinkle with sesame seeds.

recipes.title: Korean Vegan Bibimbap
recipes.description: A colorful Korean rice bowl topped with seasoned vegetables, gochujang sauce, and crispy tofu.
instructions: Cook rice and keep warm. Press and cube tofu, then pan-fry until **golden and crispy**.
Blanch spinach for 30 seconds, drain, and season with sesame oil and *a pinch of salt*.
Julienne carrots and zucchini. Sauté each separately over **high heat** for 2 minutes.
Arrange rice in bowls and top with each vegetable in *separate sections*, placing tofu in the center.
Add a generous spoonful of **gochujang** on top and mix everything together before eating.

recipes.title: Roasted Cauliflower Steaks
recipes.description: Thick-cut cauliflower steaks roasted until caramelized, served with chimichurri sauce.
instructions: **Preheat** oven to 220°C (425°F). Slice cauliflower into 2 thick steaks from the center.
Brush both sides with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, and *smoked paprika*.
Roast for **25–30 minutes**, flipping once, until deeply golden and tender.
Blend parsley, garlic, red wine vinegar, and olive oil to make a **chimichurri sauce**.
Serve cauliflower steaks drizzled with *chimichurri* and a side of crusty bread.

recipes.title: Moroccan Vegetable Tagine
recipes.description: A warming North African stew of root vegetables, dried apricots, and fragrant spices.
instructions: Peel and cube sweet potatoes into **1-inch pieces**.
Toast cumin seeds in a dry pot for *30 seconds* until fragrant. Add diced onion and sauté for 5 minutes.
Add sweet potatoes, drained chickpeas, apricots, and vegetable broth. Season with cinnamon, turmeric, and **smoked paprika**.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for **25–30 minutes** until potatoes are tender.
Garnish with *fresh cilantro* and serve over couscous.

recipes.title: Vegan Pad Thai
recipes.description: Classic Thai street food made with rice noodles, tofu, peanuts, and a sweet-tangy tamarind sauce.
instructions: Soak rice noodles in warm water for **20 minutes**, then drain.
Press and cube tofu. Fry in a hot wok with oil until *golden on all sides*.
Mix tamarind paste, soy sauce, lime juice, and a pinch of sugar for the **pad thai sauce**.
Add noodles to the wok along with the sauce. Toss over high heat for **2–3 minutes**.
Add bean sprouts and sliced green onions. Toss for *30 seconds*.
Serve topped with **crushed peanuts** and a wedge of lime.

recipes.title: Classic Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: A traditional Italian pizza with fresh mozzarella, basil, and San Marzano tomato sauce.
instructions: **Preheat** the oven to 250°C (480°F) with a pizza stone inside.
Stretch the dough into a 12-inch round on a floured surface.
Crush tomatoes by hand and spread over the dough, leaving a *1-inch border*.
Tear mozzarella into pieces and distribute across the pizza. Drizzle with **olive oil**.
Bake for **8–10 minutes** until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
Top with *fresh basil* and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Wild Mushroom Risotto
recipes.description: Creamy Italian risotto made with a medley of wild mushrooms, butter, and parmesan.
instructions: Heat broth in a saucepan and keep at a gentle simmer.
Melt 1 tbsp butter over **medium heat**. Sauté mushrooms until golden, about 5 minutes.
Sauté diced onion and garlic in 1 tbsp butter until *softened*, about 3 minutes.
Add arborio rice and stir for **1–2 minutes** until lightly toasted.
Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring frequently, for about **18–20 minutes**.
Stir in remaining butter, parmesan, and mushrooms. Season with salt and *fresh pepper*.

recipes.title: Spinach and Ricotta Stuffed Shells
recipes.description: Jumbo pasta shells filled with creamy ricotta and spinach, baked in marinara sauce.
instructions: **Preheat** oven to 190°C (375°F). Cook shells according to package directions, then drain.
Squeeze all excess moisture from the thawed spinach using a *clean kitchen towel*.
Mix ricotta, spinach, egg, and half the mozzarella. Season with salt, pepper, and **a pinch of nutmeg**.
Spread 1 cup marinara in a baking dish. Fill each shell with the ricotta mixture and nestle into the dish.
Top with remaining marinara and *shredded mozzarella*. Bake for **25–30 minutes** until bubbly.

recipes.title: French Onion Soup
recipes.description: A classic French soup with deeply caramelized onions in rich beef-free broth, topped with melted gruyère.
instructions: Slice onions thinly. Melt butter in a large pot over **medium-low heat**.
Cook onions for **35–40 minutes**, stirring occasionally, until deeply *caramelized and golden*.
Add a splash of dry white wine and scrape up any browned bits from the bottom.
Pour in vegetable broth and simmer for **15 minutes**. Season with salt and pepper.
Ladle soup into oven-safe bowls. Top each with baguette slices and *generous gruyère*.
Broil for **3–4 minutes** until cheese is melted and bubbly.

recipes.title: Caprese Pasta Salad
recipes.description: A fresh Italian pasta salad with cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, basil, and balsamic glaze.
instructions: Cook penne until **al dente**, then drain and rinse under cold water.
Halve the cherry tomatoes and tear basil leaves into *small pieces*.
Toss pasta with tomatoes, mozzarella balls, and basil in a large bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and **balsamic glaze**. Season with salt and pepper.
Serve chilled or at *room temperature*.

recipes.title: Eggplant Parmesan
recipes.description: Layers of breaded eggplant, marinara sauce, and melted cheese baked until golden.
instructions: Slice eggplant into **1/2-inch rounds**. Salt and let sit for 20 minutes to draw out moisture.
Pat dry, dip in beaten eggs, then coat in *seasoned breadcrumbs*.
Bake breaded slices on an oiled sheet at 200°C (400°F) for **20 minutes**, flipping halfway.
Spread marinara in a baking dish. Layer eggplant, more sauce, and cheeses. **Repeat layers**.
Bake at 190°C (375°F) for **25 minutes** until cheese is melted and *golden brown*.

recipes.title: Greek Spanakopita
recipes.description: Flaky phyllo pastry filled with spinach, feta, and fresh herbs in the traditional Greek style.
instructions: **Preheat** oven to 180°C (350°F). Wilt spinach in a pan, then squeeze out all moisture.
Mix spinach with crumbled feta, beaten eggs, dill, and *a pinch of nutmeg*.
Brush a baking dish with melted butter. Layer **8 sheets** of phyllo, brushing each with butter.
Spread the spinach filling evenly, then top with another **8 sheets** of buttered phyllo.
Score the top into squares with a sharp knife. Bake for **35–40 minutes** until *golden and crispy*.
Let cool for 10 minutes before cutting along the scored lines.

recipes.title: Indian Paneer Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Cubes of paneer simmered in a rich, spiced tomato-cream sauce with aromatic herbs.
instructions: Marinate paneer in yogurt, garam masala, and turmeric for **at least 30 minutes**.
Pan-fry marinated paneer until *golden on each side*. Set aside.
Sauté diced onion, garlic, and ginger in oil until softened. Add crushed tomatoes and spices.
Simmer sauce for **15 minutes**, then stir in heavy cream.
Add paneer to the sauce and cook for *5 more minutes*.
Serve over steamed basmati rice with **fresh cilantro**.

recipes.title: Cheese and Herb Omelette
recipes.description: A fluffy French-style omelette filled with gruyère, fresh herbs, and a touch of cream.
instructions: Whisk eggs with a splash of cream, salt, and pepper until *light and frothy*.
Melt butter in a non-stick skillet over **medium-low heat**.
Pour in the egg mixture and cook, gently pulling edges inward, for **2–3 minutes**.
When the top is *barely set*, sprinkle gruyère and chives on one half.
Fold the omelette and slide onto a plate. Garnish with **extra chives**.

recipes.title: Mediterranean Halloumi Salad
recipes.description: Grilled halloumi cheese over a bed of mixed greens with roasted peppers and olives.
instructions: Slice halloumi into **1/2-inch thick** pieces.
Grill or pan-fry halloumi for *2 minutes per side* until golden grill marks appear.
Arrange mixed greens on plates. Top with roasted peppers and **kalamata olives**.
Place warm halloumi on top and drizzle with olive oil and *fresh lemon juice*.
Season with cracked pepper and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Honey Glazed Roasted Vegetables
recipes.description: A colorful medley of root vegetables roasted with a sweet honey and thyme glaze.
instructions: **Preheat** oven to 200°C (400°F). Peel and cut vegetables into even-sized chunks.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet in a *single layer*.
Roast for **25 minutes**, then drizzle with honey and scatter thyme sprigs over the top.
Return to oven for **10–15 more minutes** until caramelized and *fork-tender*.
Serve as a side dish with a sprinkle of **flaky sea salt**.

recipes.title: Italian Quattro Formaggi Pasta
recipes.description: Rich and creamy four-cheese pasta made with gorgonzola, fontina, parmesan, and mozzarella.
instructions: Cook rigatoni until **al dente**. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
In a large pan, heat cream over *medium-low heat* until it begins to simmer.
Add gorgonzola, fontina, and mozzarella. Stir until **completely melted** and smooth.
Toss in the pasta, adding reserved pasta water as needed for a *silky consistency*.
Serve topped with grated **parmesan** and freshly cracked black pepper.

recipes.title: Mexican Street Corn Salad
recipes.description: A vibrant off-the-cob version of elote with cotija cheese, lime, and chili powder.
instructions: Grill corn over **high heat** for 10–12 minutes, turning occasionally, until charred.
Let cool slightly, then cut kernels off the cobs into a *large bowl*.
Mix mayonnaise with lime juice, chili powder, and a pinch of **cayenne pepper**.
Toss corn with the mayo-lime dressing and *crumbled cotija*.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with **extra lime wedges**.

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
recipes.description: Crispy romaine lettuce topped with juicy grilled chicken, croutons, and creamy caesar dressing.
instructions: Season chicken with salt, pepper, and olive oil.
Grill over **medium-high heat** for 6–7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Chop romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces and place in a *large bowl*.
Slice grilled chicken. Toss lettuce with dressing, top with chicken, croutons, and **shaved parmesan**.

recipes.title: Classic Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Seasoned ground beef in crispy taco shells with fresh toppings and melted cheese.
instructions: Brown ground beef over **medium-high heat**, breaking it apart as it cooks.
Drain fat, add taco seasoning and water. Simmer for **3–4 minutes** until thickened.
Warm taco shells according to package directions.
Fill each shell with beef, then top with lettuce, tomato, *shredded cheddar*, and sour cream.

recipes.title: Thai Basil Chicken Stir-Fry
recipes.description: A quick and fiery Thai stir-fry with chicken, holy basil, and bird's eye chilies.
instructions: Mince chicken thighs into small pieces. Slice chilies and mince garlic.
Heat oil in a wok over **high heat** until smoking. Add garlic and chilies, stir for 30 seconds.
Add chicken and stir-fry for **4–5 minutes** until cooked through.
Season with fish sauce, soy sauce, and a pinch of *sugar*.
Toss in Thai basil and stir for **10 seconds** until just wilted. Serve over jasmine rice.

recipes.title: Japanese Teriyaki Salmon
recipes.description: Pan-seared salmon fillets glazed with a sweet and savory homemade teriyaki sauce.
instructions: Pat salmon dry and season with salt and pepper.
Whisk soy sauce, mirin, and brown sugar together for the **teriyaki sauce**.
Sear salmon skin-side down in a hot skillet for **4 minutes** until *crispy*.
Flip and pour teriyaki sauce around the fillets. Cook for **3 more minutes**, spooning glaze over.
Serve over steamed rice, drizzled with sauce and sprinkled with *sesame seeds*.

recipes.title: American BBQ Pulled Pork
recipes.description: Tender slow-cooked pork shoulder shredded and tossed in smoky barbecue sauce.
instructions: Rub pork shoulder generously with salt, pepper, paprika, and **garlic powder**.
Place in a slow cooker with apple cider vinegar. Cook on low for **8–10 hours**.
Shred the pork with two forks and toss with *barbecue sauce*.
Toast brioche buns under the broiler for **1–2 minutes**.
Pile pulled pork onto buns and top with *crispy coleslaw*.

recipes.title: Indian Butter Chicken
recipes.description: Tender chicken pieces in a velvety tomato-butter sauce with warm Indian spices.
instructions: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces. Marinate in yogurt, garam masala, and turmeric for **30 minutes**.
Sear chicken in a hot pan until **golden** on each side. Set aside.
Melt butter and sauté onions, garlic, and ginger until *softened*.
Add tomato puree and simmer for **15 minutes**. Stir in cream and return chicken to the pan.
Cook for *10 more minutes* on low heat. Serve with warm **naan bread**.

recipes.title: Korean Beef Bulgogi
recipes.description: Thinly sliced beef marinated in a sweet and savory soy-pear sauce, grilled to perfection.
instructions: Mix soy sauce, grated pear, sesame oil, garlic, and sugar for the **marinade**.
Toss sliced beef in marinade and refrigerate for *at least 2 hours*.
Grill or pan-fry beef in batches over **high heat** for 2–3 minutes per side.
Garnish with sliced green onions and *toasted sesame seeds*.
Serve over steamed rice with **kimchi** on the side.

recipes.title: Mediterranean Grilled Lamb Chops
recipes.description: Herb-crusted lamb chops grilled with rosemary, garlic, and a lemon-olive oil marinade.
instructions: Mix olive oil, minced garlic, chopped rosemary, and lemon zest for the **marinade**.
Coat lamb chops and let marinate for *at least 1 hour* in the refrigerator.
Grill over **high heat** for 3–4 minutes per side for medium-rare.
Let rest for **5 minutes** before serving with a squeeze of *fresh lemon*.

recipes.title: French Coq au Vin
recipes.description: Classic French braised chicken in red wine with mushrooms, bacon, and pearl onions.
instructions: Render bacon lardons in a Dutch oven until **crispy**. Remove and set aside.
Season chicken and brown on all sides in the bacon fat over *medium-high heat*.
Add pearl onions and mushrooms, cooking for **5 minutes** until lightly browned.
Pour in red wine and chicken broth. Return bacon and chicken to the pot.
Cover and braise in a 160°C (325°F) oven for **1.5 hours** until *fall-off-the-bone tender*.
Serve with crusty bread or **mashed potatoes**.

recipes.title: Japanese Chicken Katsu Curry
recipes.description: Crispy breaded chicken cutlet served over rice with a rich Japanese-style curry sauce.
instructions: Pound chicken breasts to **even thickness**. Season with salt and pepper.
Dip in flour, then beaten egg, then coat in *panko breadcrumbs*.
Fry in oil at 180°C (350°F) for **5–6 minutes** per side until golden and cooked through.
Simmer diced carrots and onions in water. Add curry roux and stir until *thickened*.
Slice katsu into strips. Serve over rice with **generous curry sauce** ladled alongside.

recipes.title: Mexican Carnitas
recipes.description: Slow-braised pork shoulder seasoned with citrus and spices, then crisped under the broiler.
instructions: Cut pork into large chunks. Season with salt, cumin, oregano, and **chili powder**.
Place in a Dutch oven with orange juice, lime juice, and garlic. Cover tightly.
Braise in a 150°C (300°F) oven for **3–3.5 hours** until *fork-tender*.
Shred pork and spread on a baking sheet. Broil for **5 minutes** until edges are crispy.
Serve in warm tortillas with diced onion and *fresh cilantro*.

recipes.title: Middle Eastern Shawarma Bowl
recipes.description: Spiced roasted chicken served over rice with pickled turnips, tahini, and fresh vegetables.
instructions: Marinate chicken in olive oil, cumin, paprika, turmeric, and **cinnamon** for 1 hour.
Roast at 220°C (425°F) for **25 minutes** until charred and cooked through.
Cook basmati rice with a pinch of turmeric for *golden color*.
Slice chicken thinly. Assemble bowls with rice, chicken, cucumber, tomatoes, and pickled turnips.
Drizzle with **tahini sauce** thinned with lemon juice and water.

recipes.title: Italian Spaghetti Bolognese
recipes.description: A hearty meat sauce slow-simmered with tomatoes, red wine, and aromatic vegetables over spaghetti.
instructions: Finely dice carrots, celery, and onion to make a **soffritto**.
Brown ground beef in a large pot over *high heat*, breaking it apart.
Add the soffritto and cook for **5 minutes** until softened.
Pour in red wine and let it reduce by half. Add crushed tomatoes and a pinch of *sugar*.
Simmer on low heat for **at least 1 hour**, stirring occasionally.
Cook spaghetti al dente. Serve topped with sauce and **freshly grated parmesan**.

recipes.title: Thai Shrimp Fried Rice
recipes.description: A quick wok-fried rice dish with plump shrimp, vegetables, and a savory soy-garlic sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over **high heat**. Stir-fry shrimp for 2 minutes, then set aside.
Scramble eggs in the wok, breaking into *small pieces*.
Add garlic and peas and carrots. Stir-fry for **2 minutes**.
Add cold rice and toss vigorously, pressing against the wok for *slight crispiness*.
Return shrimp, add soy sauce, and toss everything together. Serve with **lime wedges**.

recipes.title: Black Bean Veggie Burger
recipes.description: A hearty vegetarian burger made with seasoned black beans, oats, and topped with cheddar cheese.
instructions: Drain and mash black beans in a bowl, leaving some chunks for **texture**.
Mix in oats, egg, cumin, smoked paprika, and *salt and pepper*.
Shape into 4 patties and refrigerate for **15 minutes** to firm up.
Cook on a hot griddle with oil for **4–5 minutes** per side until crispy.
Place a slice of cheddar on each patty during the *last minute* of cooking.
Serve on toasted buns with pickles and your **favorite toppings**.

recipes.title: Vietnamese Pho Bo
recipes.description: A deeply aromatic Vietnamese beef noodle soup with star anise, cinnamon, and fresh herbs.
instructions: Char onion and ginger under the broiler for **10 minutes**. Rinse bones in boiling water.
Simmer bones with charred aromatics, star anise, and cinnamon for *at least 3 hours*.
Add brisket to the broth during the last **1.5 hours** of cooking.
Strain broth and season with fish sauce and sugar. Slice brisket *thinly against the grain*.
Cook rice noodles and divide among bowls. Ladle hot broth over and top with **fresh herbs and bean sprouts**.

recipes.title: Middle Eastern Lamb Kofta
recipes.description: Spiced ground lamb skewers grilled and served with warm pita, yogurt sauce, and fresh salad.
instructions: Mix ground lamb with grated onion, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and **fresh mint**.
Shape into logs around skewers. Refrigerate for *30 minutes* to firm up.
Grill over **high heat** for 3–4 minutes per side until charred and cooked through.
Mix yogurt with diced cucumber and a pinch of *salt* for the sauce.
Serve kofta in warm pita with **yogurt sauce** and a simple tomato salad.

recipes.title: Thai Massaman Curry with Beef
recipes.description: A rich and mildly spiced Thai curry with tender beef, potatoes, and roasted peanuts.
instructions: Sear beef cubes in a hot pot until **browned on all sides**. Remove and set aside.
Fry massaman paste in coconut cream (thick top of the can) for *2 minutes*.
Add remaining coconut milk, potatoes, and the beef. Bring to a simmer.
Cook on **low heat for 1.5 hours** until beef is tender and potatoes are soft.
Stir in peanuts and season with fish sauce, tamarind, and *a pinch of sugar*.
Serve over steamed **jasmine rice**.

recipes.title: American Shrimp and Grits
recipes.description: Creamy Southern-style grits topped with sautéed shrimp in a buttery garlic sauce.
instructions: Cook grits in salted water according to package directions. Stir in cheddar and **1 tbsp butter**.
Season shrimp with paprika, salt, and *cayenne pepper*.
Melt remaining butter in a skillet. Sauté garlic for **30 seconds**, then add shrimp.
Cook shrimp for **2–3 minutes** per side until pink and curled.
Squeeze lemon over the shrimp. Serve on a bed of *creamy grits*.

recipes.title: Italian Chicken Piccata
recipes.description: Pan-seared chicken cutlets in a bright lemon-butter-caper sauce with fresh parsley.
instructions: Dredge pounded chicken in flour, shaking off excess. Season with **salt and pepper**.
Sear in butter and oil over *medium-high heat* for 3 minutes per side. Remove.
Add chicken broth, lemon juice, and capers to the pan. Simmer for **3 minutes**.
Swirl in remaining butter to create a *glossy sauce*. Return chicken to the pan.
Serve over angel hair pasta with sauce spooned over and **fresh parsley** on top.

recipes.title: Korean Kimchi Jjigae
recipes.description: A spicy and hearty Korean kimchi stew with pork belly, tofu, and green onions.
instructions: Sauté sliced pork belly in a pot until **lightly browned and the fat renders**.
Add kimchi and stir-fry together for *3 minutes*.
Pour in water or anchovy broth and bring to a boil. Add gochugaru and **a splash of soy sauce**.
Slide in the tofu, broken into large chunks. Simmer for **15 minutes**.
Top with sliced green onions and serve *piping hot* with steamed rice.

recipes.title: Mexican Fish Tacos
recipes.description: Beer-battered white fish in warm tortillas with cabbage slaw and chipotle crema.
instructions: Cut fish into strips. Season with salt, cumin, and **chili powder**.
Pan-fry in hot oil for *3 minutes per side* until golden and flaky.
Mix sour cream with minced chipotle pepper for the **crema**.
Toss shredded cabbage with lime juice and a *pinch of salt*.
Warm tortillas and fill with fish, cabbage slaw, and a drizzle of **chipotle crema**.

recipes.title: French Duck Confit
recipes.description: Duck legs slowly braised in their own fat until impossibly tender with crispy golden skin.
instructions: Salt duck legs generously and refrigerate **overnight** with thyme and bay leaves.
Rinse and pat dry. Submerge in melted duck fat in an *oven-safe pot*.
Cook at 135°C (275°F) for **3–4 hours** until meat is extremely tender.
Remove legs and let cool slightly. To serve, sear skin-side down in a hot skillet for **3 minutes**.
Serve with *roasted potatoes* cooked in the reserved duck fat.

recipes.title: Japanese Miso Ramen
recipes.description: A rich miso-based ramen broth with chashu pork, soft-boiled egg, and nori.
instructions: Braise pork belly in soy sauce, mirin, and sugar for **2 hours** until tender. Slice thinly.
Boil eggs for exactly *6.5 minutes* for a jammy center. Marinate in soy and mirin.
Heat broth and whisk in miso paste until **completely dissolved**.
Cook ramen noodles according to package directions. Divide into bowls.
Ladle miso broth over noodles. Top with chashu, *halved egg*, nori, and sliced **green onions**.

recipes.title: American New England Clam Chowder
recipes.description: A thick and creamy soup loaded with tender clams, potatoes, and smoky bacon.
instructions: Render bacon in a large pot until **crispy**. Remove half for garnish.
Add butter, diced celery, and onion. Cook for *5 minutes* until softened.
Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute. Add clam juice and potatoes.
Simmer for **15 minutes** until potatoes are tender.
Add clams and heavy cream. Heat through for *3 minutes* without boiling.
Serve in bowls topped with **reserved crispy bacon** and oyster crackers.

recipes.title: Indian Tandoori Chicken
recipes.description: Marinated chicken pieces baked at high heat with yogurt, lemon, and aromatic tandoori spices.
instructions: Score chicken drumsticks with deep cuts. Mix yogurt, tandoori spice, lemon juice, and **grated ginger**.
Coat chicken thoroughly and marinate for *at least 4 hours*, preferably overnight.
Place on a wire rack over a baking sheet. Bake at 230°C (450°F) for **30–35 minutes**.
Chicken should be charred at the edges and *fully cooked through*.
Serve with **naan bread** and a fresh mint-cucumber raita.

recipes.title: Thai Tom Yum Soup
recipes.description: A hot and sour Thai soup with shrimp, mushrooms, lemongrass, and kaffir lime leaves.
instructions: Bring 4 cups of water to a boil. Add bruised lemongrass and **torn lime leaves**.
Simmer for *5 minutes* to infuse the aromatics.
Add mushrooms and cook for **3 minutes**.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about *2 minutes*.
Season with fish sauce, lime juice, and **chili paste** to taste. Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Mediterranean Grilled Sea Bass
recipes.description: Whole sea bass grilled with lemon, fresh herbs, and olive oil in the Mediterranean style.
instructions: Score fish on both sides. Stuff cavities with **lemon slices and oregano**.
Brush with olive oil and season generously with *sea salt and pepper*.
Grill over **medium-high heat** for 5–6 minutes per side.
Serve with blistered cherry tomatoes and a drizzle of *extra olive oil*.

recipes.title: Korean Vegetable Japchae
recipes.description: Sweet potato glass noodles stir-fried with colorful vegetables, egg ribbons, and sesame oil.
instructions: Cook glass noodles according to package directions. Drain and toss with **sesame oil**.
Beat eggs and cook as a thin omelette. Slice into *thin ribbons*.
Sauté each vegetable separately: spinach, bell pepper, and mushrooms over **high heat**.
Toss noodles with all vegetables, egg ribbons, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Serve warm or at **room temperature**, garnished with *toasted sesame seeds*.
